description: Video CAPTCHA scenario definitions. New scenarios are auto-added via Gemini API.

scenarios.name: Traffic Light
scenarios.description: A traffic light changes from one color to another mid-video

questions.template: Should cars stop or go when the light is {next_state}?
Is it safe to cross the street when the light turns {next_state}?
What should a driver do when they see this light change?
Can pedestrians cross safely at the end?

scenarios.name: Person Walking
scenarios.description: A stick-figure person walks horizontally across a street scene

questions.template: Is the person going towards the left side or right side of the screen?
If you were standing behind this person, which way would you walk?
Is this person coming towards you or walking away?
Would this person reach the left edge or right edge first?

scenarios.name: Car Moving
scenarios.description: A simple car drives horizontally across a road

questions.template: Is the car heading towards the left or right?
If you were the driver, which direction would your steering wheel turn?
Is the car approaching or leaving?
Which side of the road will the car reach?

scenarios.name: Door Opening
scenarios.description: A wooden door swings open from closed to 70 degrees

questions.template: Is someone entering or exiting through this door?
Would you push or pull to make this door move?
Is the room becoming more visible or less visible?
Can you walk through this door at the end?

scenarios.name: Ball Rolling
scenarios.description: A colored ball rolls horizontally across a grassy field

questions.template: If you wanted to catch this ball, which way would you run?
Is the ball moving towards the left or right?
Would you need to look left or right to follow this ball?
Is the ball coming to you or going away?

scenarios.name: Bird Flying
scenarios.description: A bird flies horizontally across the sky with a wave motion and flapping wings

questions.template: Is the bird flying towards the left or right side?
If you wanted to follow this bird, which way would you turn your head?
Is the bird coming closer or flying away?
Which direction is the bird traveling?

scenarios.name: Rain Falling
scenarios.description: Rain drops fall across a gray overcast sky

questions.template: Should you take an umbrella outside?
Is it a good day for a picnic?
Would you get wet if you went outside?
Is the weather sunny or rainy?

scenarios.name: Sun Rising
scenarios.description: The sun rises from near the horizon up into the sky

questions.template: Is it morning or evening?
Is the day starting or ending?
Would you say good morning or good night?
Is it getting brighter or darker?
